headline: Brown Uni BLOODBATH 💥🔫 Ivy League LOCKDOWN 😱🚫 shooter ON THE LOOSE 🏃‍♂️🚨
text:
Brown University 🏫🍂 Ivy League ELITE 🎓👑 got STRAIGHT SLAYED 🔪💀 in a MASS SHOOTING HORROR 😱🔥! Gunman 👤🖤 ALL BLACK OUTFIT 😈🎭 stormed the Barus & Holley engineering crib 🏗️📐 during EXAM CRAM SESSION 🧠📚 – yelled some WILD SHIT 💥🗣️ then UNLEASHED HELL BULLETS 🚀💨! TWO STUDENTS DROPPED DEAD ☠️🪦, NINE OTHERS BLEEDING OUT 😵‍💫💉 'critical but stable' at Rhode Island Hospital 🏥🚑 – that's 11 BODIES HIT 🩸🍑 in Providence, RI's capital chaos 🌆🚔!

Manhunt GOING BRRRR 🏃‍♂️💨🚨 – Deputy Chief Tim O'Hara spilling tea ☕: 'EVERY RESOURCE DROPPED 🔍🕵️‍♂️ to bag this BLACK-CLAD PHANTOM 👻🖤!' CCTV caught him DIPPING OUT 🚪🏃 but face HIDDEN like a Fortnite noob 🎮😶 – NO GUN FOUND 🔫❌, NO MOTIVE TEA ☕🚫, NO uni LINKS 🤔? Students SHELTERING IN PLACE 🏠🔒, flashing lights EVERYWHERE 🚨💡, restaurants LOCKED TIGHT 🍔🚪 with civvies HIDING like it's Purge night 😨🌙! Econ prof Rachel Friedberg 📈👩‍🏫 TEA: TA said shooter BARGED IN 🚪😡, SCREAMED 🤬 then POP POP POP 💥 – kids SCRAMBLING 🏃‍♂️😱 in stadium seats, getting TAGGED 🩸!

Prez Christina Paxson 😢👩‍💼 DROPPING TEARS: 'Day we HOPED NEVER CAME 💔😭!' Provosts CANCELLED all Saturday exams 📜❌ – no more cramming, just CRASHING 😵. Student Mari Camara 🗽20yo NYC baddie hid in restaurant for 3 HOURS ⏰🍔: 'SHOCKED AF 😱 EVERYONE TERRIFIED 🚫🧠!' False alarm on a CUFFED SUSPECT 🤡🚔 – wrong dude, fam!

Trump 🍊👨‍💼 fresh from Army-Navy BALL GAME 🏈⚔️ calls it 'TERRIBLE THING 😢' – 'PRAY FOR VICTIMS 🙏🩸!' RI Gov Dan McKee 🏛️: 'UNTHINKABLE TRAGEDY 💥❤️!' Brown, OG Ivy beast 🐇🏆 with 11K+ kids 🎓📈, now 389th MASS SHOOTING THIS YEAR 📊🔫 per Gun Violence Archive – FOUR+ VICTIMS = MASSACRE MODE ACTIVATED 😤🇺🇸! Wall Street simps 📉 might call it 'market dip' but this is REAL BLOOD MONEY 💉🤑 – stay strapped, Ivy cucks, or get BROWNED 🍂💀‼️
